extraInfo.name: 龙骑兵整备格纳库
extraInfo.description: 完整格纳库，配备弹射器
extraInfo.author: 饼干酱

mod.name: 联合轻工家具拓展-UF Light Industries Furniture
Vanilla Furniture Expanded - Props and Decor

description.default: 完整格纳库，配备弹射器
description.zh-CN: 完整格纳库，配备弹射器

pawn.name: 士兵改 1
pawn.data: 士兵改 1*DMS_Mech_Bigsoldat*米莉拉与鼠联邦及寒带智人联合王国|Milira_Imperium_PlayerFaction*士兵改 1*6277888*4614487*0***0*****FF-FF-FF-FF*FF-FF-FF-FF*-1*FF-FF-FF-FF*FF-FF-FF-FF*FF-FF-FF-FF*Shooting|10|0|0|0:Melee|10|0|0|0:Construction|10|0|0|0:Mining|10|0|0|0:Cooking|0|0|0|0:Plants|0|0|0|0:Animals|10|0|0|0:Crafting|0|0|0|0:Artistic|0|0|0|0:Medicine|0|0|0|0:Social|0|0|0|0:Intellectual|0|0|0|0**QCWF_MicroMechanicalNursing|1|ArtificialBrain|3|0|-1|-1|18|:PLAMilira_Naglfar_Right_Buff|1|||0|-1|-1|442|:RIMTALK_PERSONA:%E6%9C%BA%E5%99%A8%E4%BA%BA%3A%20%E5%86%B7%E9%9D%99%E3%80%81%E9%80%BB%E8%BE%91%E6%80%A7%E5%BC%BA%E3%80%81%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E9%A9%B1%E5%8A%A8%20-%20%E7%AE%80%E6%B4%81%E7%9A%84%E8%AF%8A%E6%96%AD%E3%80%81%E6%A6%82%E7%8E%87%E5%92%8C%E9%AB%98%E6%95%88%E5%8F%8D%E5%BA%94%E3%80%82|0.2***Firefighter|0:Patient|0:Doctor|0:PatientBedRest|0:BasicWorker|0:Warden|0:Handling|0:Cooking|0:Hunting|0:Construction|0:Growing|0:Mining|0:PlantCutting|0:Smithing|0:Tailoring|0:Art|0:Crafting|0:Hauling|0:Cleaning|0:Research|0:Childcare|0:Fishing|0:HaulingUrgent|0:FinishingOff|0:NuclearWork|0:GFM_Guard|0:Diplomat|0:Storefront_Selling|0:RK_HamsterWheel|0:RimefellerCrafting|0:MiscTraining_CombatTraining|0:QuarryMining|0:Gastronomy_Waiting|0:RimPrison_WardenDuty|0:RimPrison_Supervision|0:RimPrison_BreakUp|0:RimPrison_Capture|0:Rescuing|0****Kills|0:KillsHumanlikes|0:KillsAnimals|0:KillsMechanoids|0:PawnsDowned|0:PawnsDownedHumanlikes|0:PawnsDownedAnimals|0:PawnsDownedMechanoids|0:ShotsFired|0:Headshots|0:DamageDealt|0:DamageTaken|0:TimesInMentalState|0:TimesOnFire|0:FiresExtinguished|0:OperationsReceived|0:OperationsPerformed|0:TimesTendedTo|0:TimesTendedOther|0:PeopleCaptured|0:PrisonersRecruited|0:PrisonersChatted|0:AnimalsTamed|0:AnimalsSlaughtered|0:MealsCooked|0:ThingsConstructed|0:ThingsInstalled|0:ThingsRepaired|0:ThingsCrafted|0:ThingsHauled|0:PlantsSown|0:PlantsHarvested|0:CellsMined|0:MessesCleaned|0:ResearchPointsResearched|0:CorpsesBuried|0:NutritionEaten|0:BodiesStripped|0:ThingsUninstalled|0:ThingsDeconstructed|0:ArtifactsActivated|0:ContainersOpened|0:SwitchesFlicked|0
